title: cobble
description: ever wanted your inventory to fill up quicker while mining?
body:
ever felt like your inventory isnt filling up quickly enough when mining or digging? well do i have the solution for you!

introducing cobble, this mod mostly modifies loot tables so that mining ores will drop both the clumps and some cobble as well. there are also clumps/cobbles for {dirt, sand, and netherrack}, however the loot tables for these varients are optional and requires you use the [optional datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobble-optional-replacements).

im not sure what came over me to make this mod because i would never use it but yanno!

couple notes:
- you cannot craft coarse dirt with this, as i am lazy
- this does not support mod ores ( y e t )

![made with fabric 88x31 badge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/566134d54a0d603a50b616650bc189ef3f3ed9b8.png)

### [Do checkout my other mods!!!](https://modrinth.com/user/nellePoint)
